summary: Analytics Dashboard Feature Complete - All 11 tabs verified with correct KPI cards, charts, and data. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 11 tabs (Overview, Tickets, Workforce, Financial, Clients, Assets, SLA, Workflows, Inventory, Contracts, AI Insights) rendering correctly with Recharts charts. Period selector (7d/30d/90d/365d) updates data correctly. Analytics sidebar link with BarChart3 icon present.

issues: 403 errors for favicon/static resources in console - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

overview_tab.details: 8 KPI cards (Open Tickets, Resolved This Period, New Tickets, Revenue, Active Devices, Companies, Active Engineers, Active Contracts) + 5 charts (Ticket Volume Trend, Stage Distribution pie, Workload Distribution, Revenue by Month, Top Help Topics) rendering correctly

tickets_tab.details: 6 KPI cards (Total Tickets, Open, Unassigned, Avg Resolution, P95 Resolution, Reopen Rate) + Volume trend area chart, Stage distribution bar, Priority pie chart, Top Help Topics bar, Source distribution pie, Key Insights panel

workforce_tab.details: 5 KPI cards (Engineers, Assigned Tickets, Avg Per Engineer, Total Visits, First-Time Fix) + Workload distribution stacked bar chart, Engineer scorecard table with columns (Engineer, Assigned, Closed, Avg Res, FTF%, Parts Cost)

financial_tab.details: 6 KPI cards (Total Quoted, Approved Revenue, Conversion Rate, Parts Cost, Pending Bills, Active AMC) + Revenue by month chart, Quotation pipeline pie, Pending bills aging chart

clients_tab.details: 4 KPI cards (Companies, Avg Health Score, At Risk, Devices Managed) + Company health rankings table with health score badges (green/amber/red)

assets_tab.details: 7 KPI cards (Total Devices, Active Warranty, Expired, Expiring 30d/60d/90d, With Tickets) + Warranty timeline bar chart, Brand distribution pie, Age distribution bar, Failure rate by brand table

sla_tab.details: 6 KPI cards (Total Tickets, Compliant, Breached, Compliance %, Overdue, Escalated) + SLA Breach by Priority chart, Breach by Team table, SLA Breach Trend (Weekly) line chart

workflows_tab.details: 3 KPI cards (Active Workflows, Active Tickets, Warranty Types) + Warranty Type Distribution pie + Stage backlog charts for each workflow (On-Site Technical Support, Remote Support, etc.)

inventory_tab.details: 5 KPI cards (Products, Stock Items, Low Stock Alerts, Transactions, Pending Parts) + Transaction trend (In/Out), Top consumed items, Stock alerts table when applicable

contracts_tab.details: 5 KPI cards (Total Contracts, Active, Expired, Coverage Rate, Expiring 30d) + Contract type distribution pie, Expiry pipeline bar, Contracts by company table

ai_insights_tab.details: 4 KPI cards (Trend direction, Next Week Forecast, Anomalies, Recommendations) + Weekly ticket trend area chart (12 weeks), Anomaly alerts, Action recommendations, Top issues chart

period_selector.details: All 4 periods (7d, 30d, 90d, 365d) switch correctly and update data via API calls

sidebar_link.details: Analytics link visible in sidebar with BarChart3 icon

backend_api_tests.details: 16/16 pytest tests passed covering all 11 analytics endpoints + period selector + auth requirements

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 tabs, charts, KPIs verified via Playwright)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard with 11 tabs fully implemented and tested. All backend aggregation endpoints working (/api/analytics/executive-summary, /tickets, /workforce, /financial, /clients, /assets, /sla, /workflows, /inventory, /contracts, /operational). Frontend uses Recharts library for all visualizations. Period selector changes 'days' query param. In-memory caching (5 min TTL) on backend for performance. Token stored in localStorage as 'admin_token'.
